description: Open diary/notebook with deep steel blue pages. Left page is a scrapbook collage with overlapping photos, Polaroid frames, push-pins, sparkle stars, gingham hearts, stickers. Right page has handwritten diary text on ruled lines. Month tabs across top.
final_delivery_requirement: Export as single HTML file. Uses Google Fonts (Caveat, Playfair Display). Images inline as base64 or generated.
